perturbations.notes: mini3 lac2 rescue requires LAC2 to be in the network so that LAC2 KO can rescue the mini3 small-seed phenotype. LAC2 is a peripheral seed-coat laccase that was not curated into the network (literature_gap from JUDGE iter 1). With only the MINI3 KO portion modelable, the test reduces to "mini3 KO vs mini3 KO" = ratio 1.0 unchanged, which cannot match the expected rescue direction. Re-encoded as not_in_network per REFINEMENT §1.5 Step D.

evidence.title: WRKY10 LAC2
evidence.evidence_sentence: mini3 lac2 partially rescued larger than mini3 alone

perturbations.reconciliation_note: mini3 lac2 rescue requires LAC2 to be in the network so that LAC2 KO can rescue the mini3 small-seed phenotype. LAC2 is a peripheral seed-coat laccase that was not curated into the network (literature_gap from JUDGE iter 1). With only the MINI3 KO portion modelable, the test reduces to "mini3 KO vs mini3 KO" = ratio 1.0 unchanged, which cannot match the expected rescue direction. Re-encoded as not_in_network per REFINEMENT §1.5 Step D.

perturbations.notes: DD25::IaaH is an endosperm-specific bacterial auxin-hydrolase driving LOCALISED auxin excess that causes seed abortion and cellularisation failure. FLASH-P framework treats Auxin as a single global pool and cannot represent tissue-compartment-specific perturbations. Re-encoded as not_in_network per REFINEMENT §1.5 Step D (encoding fix for framework limitation).

evidence.title: Auxin cellularization
evidence.evidence_sentence: DD25::IaaH aborting seeds resembling paternal-excess 3x seeds; cellularization fails at 7 DAP

perturbations.reconciliation_note: DD25::IaaH is an endosperm-specific bacterial auxin-hydrolase driving LOCALISED auxin excess that causes seed abortion and cellularisation failure. FLASH-P framework treats Auxin as a single global pool and cannot represent tissue-compartment-specific perturbations. Re-encoded as not_in_network per REFINEMENT §1.5 Step D (encoding fix for framework limitation).
